scripts.build: npm run build -w @testchimp/semantic-graph-core && npm run build -w @testchimp/semantic-graph-viz && npm run build -w @testchimp/semantic-graph
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @testchimp/semantic-graph-core && npm run clean -w @testchimp/semantic-graph
scripts.pack:check: npm run build && npm pack -w @testchimp/semantic-graph-core --dry-run && npm pack -w @testchimp/semantic-graph --dry-run
